parsed_review.summary:
CP00-901 is a descriptor-only RP30 People/HR Evidence (HRX-embedded) bridge pack covering RP30.P01.M03.S03-RP30.P01.M05.S02 (3 EmploymentContract implementation, 5 CompensationRecord implementation, 2 PeopleGraph security_audit units; risk A; 8 implementation + 2 security_audit). The pack-level claim is production_ready=false / runtime_ready=false / implementation_layer=descriptor with production_ready_flag=hrx_contract_compensation_graph_bridge_descriptor_verified (a descriptor-verification label, not a runtime or enterprise-trust claim). That claim is fully supported by source inspection.

Directly verified via Read/Grep/Glob: (1) packages/hrx/src/registry.js and validators.js are pure descriptor builders plus drift validators — Grep found no writeFile/appendFile, no child_process/spawn/exec(), no fetch/network, no process.env reads (the only 'exec' matches are descriptor field names like runtime_execution:false and contract_execution_runtime_opened:false). createHrxDomainRows hard-sets compensation_amount_included:false, compensation_currency_included:false, people_graph_permission_edges_included:false, people_graph_runtime_opened:false, audit_event_written:false, product_state_written:false, runtime_receipt_emitted:false for every row, and validateHrxCp901ContractCompensationGraphBridgeDescriptor (validators.js:685-801) asserts these plus the M03/M04/M05 entity descriptors (EmploymentContract/CompensationRecord/PeopleGraph) and PeopleGraph security_audit boundary. (2) packages/hrx/test/model.test.js asserts coverage.errors===[] and descriptor validation errors===[] for CP897-CP901 and explicitly asserts compensation_amount_included===false and people_graph_permission_edges_included===false. (3) contracts/hrx-people-contract.json matches the registry projection: schema_version, program_contract RP30 hrx_embedded/separate_product=false, current_pack/latest_pack CP00-901, latest_projection descriptor HrxCp901ContractCompensationGraphBridgeDescriptor, validation.valid=true; Grep confirmed zero boundary flags set to true and no currency/salary/amount values across 412 boundary-flag occurrences, and the top-level mandatory_artifacts/required_capabilities(28)/safety_gates(18)/no_leak_guards(6) match HRX_CP901_REQUIREMENTS. (4) docs/closeout-pack-plan/closeout-pack-plan.json CP00-901 entry matches the manifest plan_binding_snapshot and baseline (risk A, 10 units, range, 8 implementation + 2 security_audit, micro-title distribution 3/5/2). (5) package.json wires every validation-ladder script, and scripts/validate-rp30-hrx-people-contract.mjs and scripts/validate-rp00-control-plane-contract.mjs are validation-only (read+console+exit, no writes/exec/network), confirming Hermes control-plane patterns are used only for deterministic review/evidence handling, not product runtime (hermes_packet.emits_runtime_receipt=false; command-evidence hermes_gate references rp00_control_plane_contract_validate and spec_requirement_validate command_ids only).

Authority boundary preserved: descriptor.authority_boundary.claude_is_final_approval=false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true, runtime_opening_pack_id=CP00-902; claude_packet.read_only=true, promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false; HRX_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION fully closed. The pack does not claim runtime or enterprise trust, so the human-final-approval boundary is correctly outside this receipt and does not set blocks_goal_closeout. Review-hardening checks pass: readiness auth preflight succeeded (exit 0, 1434-byte stdout, well-formed JSON success result), and manifest/claude-review-result record zero invalid attempts passed off as valid (the unrelated docs/ldip-integration/.../c-ldip-01-invalid-attempt-01.json is correctly excluded as an unrelated dirty file, not attributed to CP00-901).

Relied on (recorded evidence, not re-executed under the read-only/no-Bash constraint): command-evidence.json shows targeted HRX validations (node --check, node --test, rp30:validate, rp30:hrx:validate, hrx:requirements:validate, hrx:weighted:validate) at exit 0; the full deterministic ladder (closeout-pack-plan:validate, closeout-pack:validate, npm test, validate, spec:requirements:validate, weighted:validate, fullplan:validate, goal:closeout:validate, rp00:control-plane:validate, git diff --check) is documented as the closeout gate and remains pending by design (gate_outcome=pending_hardened_review_and_full_validation; commit_policy.status=blocked_until_review_and_full_validation). The pending state of manifest/claude-review-result/construction-inspection/adjudication is expected — they are resolved by this review receipt and the subsequent ladder run, not defects. No P0/P1/P2 issues found; one P3 informational note on reviewer evidence scope.

findings.title: Read-only review relied on recorded command-evidence; full validation ladder executes at closeout by design
findings.details: As the read-only reviewer (Read/Grep/Glob only, no Bash), I could not execute the validation ladder myself. command-evidence.json records only the targeted HRX validations (node --check syntax checks, node --test, rp30:hrx:validate, rp30:validate, hrx:requirements:validate, hrx:weighted:validate) at exit 0, with gate_outcome=pending_hardened_review_and_full_validation. The broader ladder (closeout-pack-plan:validate, closeout-pack:validate, npm test, validate, spec:requirements:validate, weighted:validate, fullplan:validate, goal:closeout:validate, rp00:control-plane:validate, git diff --check) is intentionally deferred to the closeout step. This is the documented sequencing (commit_policy.status=blocked_until_review_and_full_validation), not a defect. The descriptor-only implementation, tests, contract projection, plan binding, authority boundary, Hermes-control-plane scoping, and no-write/no-real-data boundaries were all independently confirmed by source inspection.
findings.recommendation: At closeout, execute and record the full deterministic validation ladder green (especially npm test, npm run validate, npm run closeout-pack:validate, npm run rp00:control-plane:validate, and git diff --check) before committing, then update claude-review-result.json / construction-inspection.json / adjudication.md with this review receipt. No code change is required.
findings.post_review_disposition: Informational only; expected gating sequence. Does not block pack or goal closeout. No unresolved P0/P1.
